title: Aquarium Gantry Pipe-Sizing (feasibility-gated 2D truss FEM)
strategies: trivial: set every pipe to the maximum area Amax (safe, heavy) -> ratio 0.1
greedy: shrink all pipes by one uniform scale factor until just feasible (bounded by joint deflection)
strong: fully-stressed design -- iterate FEM and resize each pipe to |N|/sigma, then scale up to meet the displacement limit
invalid: zero/undersized areas that violate the manufacturable bound and the feasibility gate -> 0
